name: Saber-Toothed Tiger

traits.name: Running Leap
traits.text: With a 10-foot running start, the tiger can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

text:
# Saber-Toothed Tiger

*Large Beast, Unaligned*

A prehistoric great cat with dagger-length fangs.

### Actions

**Rend.** Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.
